name: Johona Gambrel Garage Plan - 14x20 Barn-Style Garage with Loft Potential | DIY Workshop & Storage Building Plans
open_features: Classic barn-style architecture with a high-capacity roof profile that increases interior height and visual character.
The 14x20 footprint provides ample room for motorcycles, ATVs, lawn equipment, workshop benches, or compact vehicle storage.
The gambrel roof naturally creates overhead loft potential-perfect for seasonal storage, tool organization, or an elevated workspace.
Straightforward framing techniques and efficient dimensions make Johona an achievable project for beginner builders and experienced DIY enthusiasts.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Johona Gambrel Garage - a versatile 14x20 barn-style garage and workshop building designed for efficiency, durability, and classic architectural charm. Featuring the iconic gambrel roof profile, Johona maximizes interior headroom while delivering the timeless look of a traditional barn structure. With its balanced footprint, loft-ready roof design, and DIY-friendly construction, this garage blends smart functionality with eye-catching curb appeal....
